title: oreogrammitis cervicornis
intro: Oreogrammitis cervicornis, also known as the Antelope fern or Antelope's horn fern, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. The health benefits of Oreogrammitis cervicornis include potential relief from arthritis, respiratory issues, and digestive problems. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water, which can be used as a tea or applied topically as a poultice to utilize its medicinal properties.
